description: A pediatric patient is being seen, and their parent needs to be added as the financial guarantor for the account.

nodes.task_description: Verify clinician access and patient identity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the child's patient chart.

nodes.task_description: Create a new person record for the parent (guarantor) or link to their existing record if they are also a patient.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates or finds the guarantor's record.

nodes.task_description: Link the guarantor's record to the patient's account and designate them as financially responsible.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully establishes the patient-guarantor relationship for billing purposes.
